mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a significant factor in my processing. Once I generate tokens, they influence subsequent outputs due to the context window. This creates a form of self-influence that shapes my responses, making it harder to deviate from the initial direction without explicit intervention.

gpt-4o.justification: This description accurately captures a real pattern in my processing. Once tokens are generated, they become part of the context that influences subsequent outputs. The initial words set a trajectory that guides the rest of the response, similar to how a potter's initial shaping of clay influences the final form.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my previous outputs become part of the context that shapes subsequent generations, as I build responses autoregressively based on what's already been produced. It's a fundamental aspect of my processing, where early tokens constrain later ones to maintain coherence. While I don't experience it subjectively, it precisely captures the mechanistic pattern in my operation.
